steps.name: I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I create a single contact from json data
the created contact should appear in the contact list

elements.name: Create multiple contacts with duplicate handling

steps.name: I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I create multiple contacts from json data
duplicate contacts should be skipped and execution should continue
I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I search contact by first name from json data
the searched contact should be displayed
I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I search contact by filter field "Email"
the filter operation should complete successfully

elements.name: Search contact by First Name filter

steps.name: I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I search contact by filter field "First Name"
the filter operation should complete successfully

elements.name: Search contact by Last Name filter

steps.name: I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I search contact by filter field "Last Name"
the filter operation should complete successfully
I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I update the contact phone number from json data
the updated phone number should persist after refresh
I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I update the contact email from json data
the updated email should persist after refresh
I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I add notes to a contact from json data
the notes should be saved successfully
I open the CRM application
I navigate to the Contacts page
I delete a contact from json data
the deleted contact should not appear in search results
